text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yesterday, Mayano and I were watching this
thriller series she's been getting into.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
We were just gonna watch one episode, but
Mayano said she figured out who the culprit was,
and at the end of the episode it turned out she
was right.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So of course I wanted to try my hand at guessing
too. And we got so into the whole thing, guessing
culprit after culprit...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: We ended up watching the whole series. Yawn...
